Based on the provided context, the commentator and author who questioned the validity of the Center for Organizational Research and Education (CORE)'s non-profit status is **Rachel Maddow**.

The text states that "commentators from Rachel Maddow to Michael Pollan have treated the group as an entity that specializes in astroturfing," and explicitly mentions that experts and commentators have questioned the validity of the group's non-profit status. Rachel Maddow is identified in the first paragraph as a "television host, political commentator, and author."
